adjustment.income_proxy_bracket_counts: object with integer keys Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4

rank_shift.priority_review_states: array of five state abbreviations in adjusted priority order
rank_shift.top_downward_shift_states: array of five state abbreviations ordered by rank_shift ascending
rank_shift.top_upward_shift_states: array of five state abbreviations ordered by rank_shift descending

weighted_model.income_p_bucket: enum: lt_0_001, lt_0_01, lt_0_05, ge_0_05, not_computed
weighted_model.poverty_p_bucket: enum: lt_0_001, lt_0_01, lt_0_05, ge_0_05, not_computed
